summary: Session 3 (Getting Started three-way choice and Python prerequisite, Feature 2) complete. Three-way setup choice: the form's tier step gains a Lightweight-only verificationMode radio block (verificationModeBlockHtml, mirror of the Full-only budget block; omitted from the DOM on Full); the pick survives webview teardown via the restoreGsState verificationMode/modeDirty/lastModeSeed family with marker-seed semantics mirroring the S2 tier contract, and the client seed tuple grew to (rootId, tierSeed, verificationModeSeed); the pick rides build-structure and build-session-sets as an untrusted rider narrowed fail-loud (asVerificationModeRider / resolveVerificationMode: absent defaults, unrecognized rejects operator-visibly, Full drops it), threads through structureOnlyContext (the A11 hardcode replaced, param narrowed to the closed union) into the scaffold's durable .dabbler/verification-mode marker write, and steers buildSessionGenPrompt (exemplar renders the operator's mode on Lightweight, dedicated-sessions guidance line, palette path reads the durable marker). Python prerequisite (A10 + Critique-2 M7): probePythonPresenceCore / findCommandOnPath (platform-PARAMETER-driven path semantics; skips the Microsoft Store WindowsApps alias; requires a regular FILE so a directory-valued pythonPath fails) feeds the new pythonPresent payload flag rendered as a prominent tier-independent step-1 warning; buildProjectStructureNoPrompt runs the probe as its first side-effect-free step (before git init, markers, and rendered docs) failing friendly via describeMissingPython, with a no-artifacts-on-failure regression test; the probe and the scaffold spawn share one bootstrap resolution (resolveBootstrapPythonCore: python3-then-python on POSIX, python-only on win32, explicit setting decides alone) so they cannot disagree; setupVerification.runChangeWriter gained a pre-spawn interpreterResolves check. Troubleshooting appendix verified via routed documentation review; one accepted gap landed (the appendix explains the Store-alias skip) with goldens regenerated x2 tiers. Tier-aware auto-opened doc (M6): openGettingStartedDoc leads with a recorded-tier callout when a durable tier resolves (fence-aware H1 insertion, materialized to globalStorage). Routed code-review (opus + gpt-5.4 auto-verify, raw in s3-code-review.md): 2 Major fixed (picked-folder open gated on scaffold success; directory-as-interpreter), 2 Minor fixed, 2 documented, 1 refuted with evidence, 1 deferred with reason. Verification round 1 (gpt-5.4) found S077-S3-V1-001 (probe/spawn interpreter mismatch on python3-only POSIX); fixed with shared bootstrap resolution + 5 regression tests; round 2 VERIFIED with no nits. Suites at close: pytest 2268/5/0, tsc clean, mocha 1030/0, Playwright 19/19 serial local (documented Electron-contention flake applies to parallel runs only), drift guard green incl. dist-in-sync.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis at S3 close (gemini-pro) confirmed the standing S4 recommendation: Session 4 mixes canonical engine-facing documentation with intricate close-out-path Python (gate keying across three no_router branches, a verdict parser with round semantics, the session_state atomic-write robustness class) — the highest-blast-radius session of the set; effort=high per the standing recommendation for that mix.
